use_case: Understand adoption barriers and purchase triggers for high-protein, low-carb snack products among health-conscious urban Indians

target_segments.name: Health-Conscious Urban Professionals
target_segments.description: Urban Indian professionals aged 25-40 following or curious about high-protein, keto, or low-carb diets. Gym-going or fitness-aware. Price-sensitive but willing to pay premium for perceived health benefit.

target_segments.name: Diabetic and Pre-Diabetic Adults
target_segments.description: Adults aged 35-55 managing blood sugar, recommended low-carb by doctor or self-researching. Motivated by health necessity, not fitness aspiration.

notes: Both segments need Sarvam for authentic Indian dietary and cultural context. Simulation-ready to test purchase decision scenarios.
